security_fixes: C021: ladder.ts containedPath check on spot.target_file before readFile/writeFile (path.join with absolute accepts /etc/passwd)
C022: ladder.ts containedPath check on snapshot bakPath derived from spot.id (dotdot in id escapes snapshotsDir)
C012: requestHint.ts containedPath check on rungRelPath joined into paths/<slug>/ (dotdot in rungs.* reads arbitrary files)
phases.ts: SLUG_REGEX /^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9_-]*$/ validation on phase.id and spot.id at validatePhases time
phases.ts: isSafeRelativePath() rejects dotdot and absolute paths for target_file and rungs.*
